title: Greshollpolyforim
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Greshollpolyforim''' was a chemical compound used to help a user typically hindered by operating in high [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] be able to move as if in their typical gravity. It cost 150 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] per dose and the effects lasted for 3 hours. Greshollpolyforim could be applied by the [[Cyduct E-23 Booster]] interdermal injection system.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]'' {{1stm}}
*<!-- 1998-04-XX -->''[[The Far Orbit Project]]''
